title: Mochi Potato Tempura
description: A Japanese-inspired dessert featuring crispy tempura-fried mochi and sweet potato slices, perfect for a sweet treat.

ingredients.name: sweet potato
ingredients.notes: peeled and sliced into 1/4-inch thick rounds

instructions: 1. In a bowl, mix together flour and cornstarch for dusting.
2. Cut mochi into 1-inch pieces and dust with flour mixture, shaking off excess.
3. Heat 1 cup of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F.
4. Add mochi pieces to the hot oil in batches and fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Using a slotted spoon, remove fried mochi from oil and drain on paper towels.
7. Add sweet potato slices to the hot oil in batches and fry until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
8. Using a slotted spoon, remove fried sweet potato from oil and drain on paper towels.
9. Serve mochi and sweet potato tempura hot, dust with powder sugar if desired.
